hero_landing.title_highlight: created by AI, approved by you
hero_landing.description: Send an idea from Telegram. AI generates the text, image and picks the best time to publish. You approve with a tap.

workflow_section.title: How Nex-Nex works
workflow_section.subtitle: From idea to published post in minutes, no technical knowledge required.

01.title: Upload your brand context
01.description: Add PDFs, URLs or descriptions about your company. AI learns your voice, values and products.

02.title: Generate post ideas
02.description: Get 100 ideas organized by category: educational, promotional, storytelling, seasonal.

03.title: Choose your topic
03.description: Select the idea that fits or send any topic directly from Telegram.

04.title: AI generates the text
04.description: The text is written in your brand voice, adapted for each social media platform.

05.title: Add a photo (optional)
05.description: Send a photo from your phone. AI transforms it into a professional social media image.

06.title: AI generates the image
06.description: No photo? AI creates an original image based on your post content.

07.title: Schedule publishing
07.description: Choose a date and time, or let AI find the optimal moment for your audience.

08.title: AI picks the best time
08.description: Based on historical data, AI recommends the time slot with the highest engagement.

09.title: Post publishes automatically
09.description: Nex-Nex publishes simultaneously on all selected platforms without any extra steps.

10.title: Publish in any language
10.description: One piece of content, culturally adapted for any market you want to reach.

bentogrid_section.title: Everything you need for social media
bentogrid_section.subtitle: Features built for content creators and marketing agencies.

brand_intelligence.title: Brand Intelligence
brand_intelligence.description: AI learns your brand voice, values and products from PDF documents, URLs and descriptions. Every post sounds like you.

from_idea_to_published.title: From idea to published
from_idea_to_published.description: Send a topic from Telegram. In 2 minutes you have text, image and the post scheduled across all platforms.

languages.title: Any language, any market
languages.description: Generate content in any language. Culturally adapted, not just translated.

best_time.title: Best time to publish
best_time.description: AI analyzes your history and recommends the time with the highest reach for your audience.

features_section.label: Features
features_section.title: Everything you need for social media
features_section.subtitle: AI tools built to simplify content creation and publishing.

telegram_bot.title: Telegram Bot
telegram_bot.description: Send an idea from your phone. AI generates the post, you approve with a tap. Immediate or scheduled publishing.

brand_intelligence.title: Brand Intelligence (RAG)
brand_intelligence.description: Upload PDF, DOCX or URL with your brand description. AI writes as if it has known your company for years.

editorial_calendar.title: Editorial Calendar
editorial_calendar.description: Monthly and weekly view. Drag & drop to reschedule. Colors per platform and status.

idea_generator.title: Idea Generator
idea_generator.description: 100 post ideas generated from your brand context. Educational, promotional, storytelling — organized by category.

agency_mode.title: Agency Mode
agency_mode.description: Manage all clients from one account. Fast switch between workspaces, unified billing.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Reach, impressions, likes and shares synced automatically from all platforms. Top 5 posts per period.

testimonials_section.label: Testimonials
testimonials_section.title: What Nex-Nex users say
testimonials_section.subtitle: Over 500 creators and agencies publish faster and more efficiently with Nex-Nex.

items.name: Andrei Popescu
items.review: I went from 3 hours/week on social media to 15 minutes. Nex-Nex generates exactly our brand tone — I no longer correct AI texts.

items.name: Maria Ionescu
items.review: I manage 8 clients with Nex-Nex Agency. Visual calendar, quick approval, automatic publishing. It eliminated half of my manual work.

items.name: Radu Constantin
items.review: The Telegram bot is brilliant. I take a photo of a new product, AI writes the caption, I approve, done. The whole process takes 2 minutes.

items.name: Elena Dumitrescu
items.review: RAG makes the difference compared to any other tool. AI knows exactly the prices, features and values of my brand. Zero posts with wrong information.

items.name: Mihai Stanescu
items.review: Our team of 5 now publishes 3x more content. The approval workflow with Nex-Nex is much faster than any tool we have tested.

items.name: Ana Popa
items.review: As a freelancer with 12 clients, Nex-Nex Agency saved my business. One subscription, all clients under control, simple billing.

items.name: Bogdan Muresan
items.review: I tried Buffer, Hootsuite, SocialBee. Nex-Nex is the only one with Telegram bot + RAG per client. For agencies, it is a game changer.

items.name: Ioana Constantin
items.review: I knew nothing about social media. Now I post daily on Instagram and Facebook without losing time. Nex-Nex does everything — I just approve.
